_comment: Reolink camera specs (from manufacturer pages, 2026). For reference + future lens-intrinsic/undistortion work. fov in degrees.

Duo3.note: Dual-lens stitched 180 deg panorama; strong non-linear distortion -> use 'poly'/TPS mapping. Stream may be coded 2160x7680 (rotated).

RLC-1212A.note: Wide rectilinear bullet; moderate barrel distortion at edges; homography OK for ground plane.

RLC-520A.note: Dome; 4mm=80degH (2.8mm variant=100degH). Mounted ~nadir over a shelter; homography from the shelter rectangle gives direct cm/pixel.
